title: Payment webhook incident: duplicate charges
content: Incident where the payment webhook fired twice, creating duplicate charges on deposit callbacks during the provider outage.

title: Retry policy for webhook callbacks
content: Rule describing exponential backoff and safe retry behaviour for payment webhook and deposit callback handlers.

title: Idempotency keys on webhook endpoint
content: Decision to require idempotency keys on payment webhook endpoint to prevent duplicate charges.

title: Deposit job retry loop bug
content: Bug where the deposit settlement job entered an infinite retry loop on transient payment provider errors.

title: Implement OTP signup flow
content: Task to implement OTP auth during signup flow and wire verification endpoint.

title: Signup flow specification
content: Spec for the end-to-end auth signup flow including OTP verification and session creation.

title: Auth session invariants
content: Rule describing session refresh invariants and token rotation for authentication.

title: Auth session refresh architecture
content: Architecture describing how auth sessions refresh tokens without dropping active sockets.

title: KYC verification provider decision
content: Decision to keep the current KYC verification provider after evaluating two alternatives.

title: KYC domain rule: block unverified withdrawals
content: Rule that blocks withdrawals for any KYC account in the unverified state.

title: KYC flow failing on document upload
content: Bug where the KYC verification flow rejects valid documents uploaded through the modal.

title: Withdrawal UI modal design
content: Product spec describing the withdrawal UI modal design including confirmation copy and error states.

title: UI modal confirmation rule
content: Rule that every destructive UI modal must have an explicit confirmation step.

title: Trading execution architecture
content: Architecture describing trading execution service and order routing.

title: Integration provider research
content: Research note comparing third-party integration providers for notification delivery.
